project: Petoskey Pit amphitheatre — Open Civic Bowl (in-situ package)

design_of_record.scenario: Scenario E three-section civic bowl (east/bend/south) on the Scenario D restored baseline
design_of_record.status: seating / ADA / drainage cost-proxy ACCEPTED · stage refit OPEN (Rule 9)

crs.horizontal: EPSG:6494 NAD83(2011) / Michigan Central, INTERNATIONAL feet

seating.rows_absent_reason: row 5 = promenades; rows 9/10 reclassified as the accessible cross-aisle

stage.kind: low hardscape deck + shoulders (open to bay side, no upstage wall — landscape venue)
stage.status: PROVISIONAL — Rule 9 OPEN; no adoption path declared

ada_route.kind: REBUILT node-to-node accessible network: rim arrival + south egress + cross-aisle + floor + wheelchair clusters + classified service spur
ada_route.status: ADA-compliant route concept pending civil/code detailing — topology, conflicts and slopes validated; code details explicitly unchecked
ada_route.legacy: 2026-06-12: legacy scenarioE ada_ramp/landing REJECTED (disconnected fragments; route A 63% in treatment cell; route B crossed swale short of the cross-aisle) — quarantined in vectors_geojson/legacy_ada_rejected.geojson

cross_aisle.kind: rows 9/10 reclassified as level accessible cross-aisle

drainage.kind: east + south flank swales falling to the treatment cell

treatment_cell.kind: dry ephemeral bioretention landscape (natural bowl bottom)
treatment_cell.shaping: concept tier — schematic 4:1, down-only, never impounds permanent water

bay_view_axis.note: NNW toward Little Traverse Bay / evening sun

event_floor.kind: orchestra/event floor between stage and row 1

options.label: Scenario E baseline
options.validation_status: ACCEPTED control (seating/ADA/drainage); re-emits at 500.8 CY, drift +0.0 vs locked earthwork.csv
options.stage_status: Rule 9 OPEN — inherited az-150 stage carried PROVISIONAL; P_opt/apron/typologies are candidates only, none adopted
options.recommended_posture: Fallback regardless of the decision; choose if no further earthwork is wanted

options.label: modest_normalization (seating)
options.validation_status: EMITTED + VALIDATED 2026-06-11, all hard gates pass (recipe cut cap 1.25 ft with provenance); +114 claim validated in full
options.stage_status: Rule 9 OPEN — inherited az-150 stage carried PROVISIONAL; P_opt/apron/typologies are candidates only, none adopted
options.recommended_posture: Cheapest validated step if any expansion is funded

options.label: ambitious_shaped_bowl (seating scope)
options.validation_status: EMITTED + VALIDATED 2026-06-11, all hard gates pass; quote +262/1,505 (NOT 1,665 — N1 east extension REJECTED on emission, 0 of +149 survive)
options.stage_status: Rule 9 OPEN — inherited az-150 stage carried PROVISIONAL; P_opt/apron/typologies are candidates only, none adopted
options.recommended_posture: Validated Pareto knee — recommended scope if budget allows; Pareto ordering unchanged by the CY restatement

pending_decisions.question: Adopt an ADA route concept (triggers construction-envelope re-emission and locks the circulation plan)

options.label: Concept C — naturalistic promenade (RECOMMENDED, currently governs at planning grade)
preferred constructed alternative — carried, NOT adopted; adoption path: fix 2 row severances + causeway C-value sightline study, then re-run the documented decision rule

pending_decisions.decision_rule: D governs if dignity advantage >=20 pts AND seats displaced <60 (<5% of 1,283) AND no rows severed mid-tread; otherwise C governs and the preferred D is carried as the design-development alternative
pending_decisions.terrain_bound_note: every compliant route is floored at ~4-5x the desire line by the bowl itself

warnings: PLANNING-GRADE ONLY — derived from 2015 USGS LiDAR + supplement; not a stamped engineering design and not a field survey.
Stage deck is PROVISIONAL: DESIGN_CANON.md Rule 9 is OPEN (inherited az-150 stage; +25.6° audience-axis mismatch on record).
Coordinates are EPSG:6494 INTERNATIONAL feet — misreading as US survey feet shifts absolute easting ~39 ft (docs/datum_note.md).
Component CY totals are validated proxies that understate mobilization-level earthwork (analysis/tier_emission/TIER_EMISSION_VALIDATION.md).
Seating scope Decision 1 is pending; this package shows the Scenario E baseline (option A).
Treatment-cell shaping and orchestra/event floor are concept-tier (illustrative), not geometry-backed.
missing_data: Full ADA/code compliance (built cross-slopes, handrails, clearances)
